title: Red Netherite Armor and Tools
description:
Makes all of the netherite textures red, includes:
- Netherite Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings and Boots
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Ingot
- Netherite Scraps
body:
Changes all netherite textures to have a more deep red tint,
These are all of the textures that are changed:

- Netherite Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings and Boots
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Pickaxe  
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Ingot
- Netherite Scrap
